summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the enrollment system for The Ile Ubuntu platform. All 18 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed for enrollment flow, progress tracking, and My Learning sections.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: Enrollment system properly implements all CRUD operations with correct RBAC
Progress calculation correctly updates when lessons are completed
enrolled_count on course document properly increments/decrements on enroll/unenroll
My Learning section on Dashboard shows enrolled courses with progress circles
Faculty can view enrolled students with their progress on course detail page
Students cannot access enrollment list endpoint (403 properly returned)

test_credentials.test_users_created: Test users created directly in MongoDB for API testing (faculty, student, student2 roles)

seed_data_creation: Test users, sessions, courses, lessons, and enrollments created with TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enrollment system fully tested. Backend tests cover: enroll in active course, cannot enroll in draft course, cannot double-enroll, enrollment status, lesson completion with progress updates, course progress endpoint, my-courses endpoint, faculty viewing enrolled students, student cannot view enrollments, unenroll functionality. Frontend tests cover: Courses page with Browse All and My Learning tabs, course detail page with enrollment button, progress bar, lesson completion toggles, Dashboard My Learning section with progress circles, faculty view of enrolled students.

frontend: Dashboard loads with My Learning section - PASSED
Courses page has Browse All and My Learning tabs - PASSED
New Course button visible for faculty - PASSED
Course creation and publishing works - PASSED
Course detail page shows Enroll button for non-enrolled students - PASSED
Enrollment updates UI to show progress bar and Unenroll button - PASSED
Lesson completion toggles work and update progress - PASSED
Progress bar displays correctly (33% after 1/3 lessons) - PASSED
My Learning tab shows enrolled courses with progress circles - PASSED
Dashboard My Learning section shows enrolled courses - PASSED
Faculty can see Enrolled Students section on course detail - PASSED

enrollment_endpoints.POST /api/courses/{id}/enroll: Student enrolls in active course - WORKING
enrollment_endpoints.POST /api/courses/{id}/enroll (draft): Cannot enroll in draft course (400) - WORKING
enrollment_endpoints.POST /api/courses/{id}/lessons/{lid}/com: Mark lesson complete, progress updates - WORKING
enrollment_endpoints.GET /api/courses/{id}/progress: Returns progress with completed_lessons and total_lessons - WORKING
enrollment_endpoints.GET /api/enrollments/my-courses: Returns enriched enrollment list with course info - WORKING
enrollment_endpoints.GET /api/courses/{id}/enrollments (facul: Faculty can see enrolled students - WORKING

frontend_features.Courses page tabs: Browse All and My Learning tabs - WORKING
frontend_features.Course cards enroll button: Shows for non-enrolled active courses - WORKING
frontend_features.Dashboard My Learning: Shows enrolled courses with progress circles - WORKING
frontend_features.Progress bar: Displays correctly on course detail page - WORKING
